name: ProxyTypes
summary: Defines the proxy type of the render content

enum_values.name: Single
enum_values.summary: A proxy that represents a single material in the CRhinoDoc::m_material_table

enum_values.name: Multi
enum_values.summary: A proxy that represents multiple materials - all similar.

enum_values.name: Texture
enum_values.summary: A proxy that represents textures, either in the texture table, or attached to materials or environments.
